name: multi-agents-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin for multi-agent orchestration — ask questions, review PRs, fix PR issues, and host panel discussions using configurable external AI agents in parallel.

plugins.name: multi-agents
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration plugin. Bundles skills that coordinate configurable AI agents for questions, code reviews, PR fixes, and panel discussions. Agents configured via CLAUDE.md or auto-detected.
